name: command-menu
title: Command Menu
description: Spotlight-style command palette with search and keyboard shortcuts.
docs:
# Command Menu
Spotlight-style command palette with search and keyboard shortcuts.
## Import
```tsx
import { CommandMenu } from "@/components/ui/command-menu";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<CommandMenu />
```
## Props
- **placeholder** (string) — default: `"Search commands..."`: Placeholder
- **reverse** (boolean): Reverse
- **pauseOnHover** (boolean): Pause on hover
- **repeat** (number): Repeat
- **duration** (number): Duration (s)
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add command-menu
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/command-menu
```
